рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

This Python-based Windows application simplifies the customization of Android TV devices. It allows users to connect via Wi-Fi, debloat unnecessary apps, install custom launchers and APKs, and disable the default Google TV launcher, leading to a cleaner and faster user experience.

вң… Camera-free training for pose estimation

рҹ”Қ 24 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

вқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮвқӮ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

RuView is a Rust-based WiFi sensing platform that uses ESP32 sensors to capture and interpret Channel State Information (CSI) from WiFi signals. It enables real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring (breathing and heart rate), activity recognition, and environmental mapping without requiring cameras or wearables. The system operates entirely on edge hardware, learning environments locally and ensuring privacy.

вң… Fast conversation filtering

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

SBV (SMS Backup Viewer) is a modern web application designed to view SMS and MMS message backups from XML files generated by the 'SMS Backup & Restore' app. It provides a user-friendly, texting app-like interface for browsing, searching, and filtering messages, including support for media attachments and call logs.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Maivi is a cross-platform desktop application that provides real-time, local voice-to-text transcription using advanced AI models. It features hotkey support for easy recording, automatic clipboard copying, and a floating overlay for live transcription, designed to be efficient and accurate even on CPU.
